title: Mirror column not searchable
excerpt: The utility of mirror columns would greatly increase if the mirrored data was actually searchable.

posts.author: Marsbars (Marissa Holmbeck)
posts.cookedHtml: The utility of mirror columns would greatly increase if the mirrored data was actually searchable.

posts.author: arkitrave (Eric Shepherd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Adding my vote to this - I didn’t realize when I built out my boards that mirrored columns weren’t searchable. “Search Everything” definitely implies the opposite.

When I search within a board, I can find the content in the mirrored column; why can’t that content be found when I use Search Everything?

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: We have incorporated a unique identifier number that connects to several boards. But it only shows the parent one in search everything. It is unfortunate! Hope this can be fixed.
